title: Banana And Chocolate Chip Muffins
description: Have some overripe bananas which you don’t feel like eating? Don’t worry, use them to make these delicious banana chocolate chip muffins which are soft, moist and easy to make.
author: Sanjeev Kapoor

ingredients.raw: ¼ cup chocolate chips + to sprinkle
ingredients.name: ¼ cup chocolate chips + to sprinkle

steps: Peel bananas and transfer them into a bowl and mash well.
Break eggs directly into the bowl, add melted butter, almond milk and castor sugar and whisk well.
Sift almond flour, baking powder and salt directly into the banana mixture.
Add ¼ cup chocolate chips and mix well.
Transfer the mixture into muffins moulds lined with cupcake liners and sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
Keep the moulds in the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Bring the moulds out of the oven and allow to cool.
Demould them, arrange on a serving platter and serve.
